meaning: adj.多花的,盛开的,(果实)有粉衣的
examples: Will happen one day, you can come back, bloomy spring.
These cheeses have a characteristic "bloomy" crust, created when bacteria ripen the cheese from the inside out.
Give Bloomy's a list of people you're shopping for, describe their interests, give your price range and a store representative will call you with suggestions.
Like Barista Parlor, No 308 also makes regular visits to local Porter Road Butchers and The Bloomy Rind for the charcuterie ingredients on their small plates menu.
